date: # 14-day experiment (13-26 Jul). Fill after each RUN. Measure the chain: comment/post -> profile -> web -> conversation -> real spec review -> workshop proposal.
# DISTRIBUTION signals: impressions/profile_views/followers_gained/featured_link_clicks/website_sessions_utm. Do NOT treat likes or impressions as leads.
# EXPERIMENT GOAL (not revenue): >=3 ICP conversations AND >=1 real spec (Anfrage) reviewed AND >=1 concrete chance to send an RFQ Readiness Workshop proposal.
# GREEN = goal met AND >=10 campaign-attributable website visits AND repeated signals from builders/technical-sales.
# AMBER = profile views + reactions but <5 website visits; distribution mostly software/consultants; clicks without follow-through.
# RED = 7 posts + all planned comments executed AND no attributable website visit AND no qualified conversation AND audience mostly developers/consultants/agencies.
